# Intel 4004 bootstrap capacitors with per-cap values.
# Extracted from Lajos layout BMPs by extract_caps.py.
# Format: <gate> <source> <pixel_area> <C_femtofarads>
# pixel_um=1.5, Cox=0.00069 F/m^2
S00531 N0740 692 1074.33

S00818 N0714 392 608.58

S00819 N0937 219 340.00
S00825 N0715 399 619.45
S00828 N0854 714 1108.48
S00833 N0716 482 748.31

S00835 N0696 3 4.66
S00836 N0693 381 591.50
S00839 N0698 471 731.23
S00840 N0695 474 735.89
# D-bus pin capacitance per Intel 4004 datasheet (CDB = 7 pF typ).
# Without these, our model has only intrinsic Meyer caps (~20 fF
# per transistor) on the data bus; real silicon presents 7 pF of
# pin + routing + package loading. The driver-vs-load ratio is
# 350x off without this row, which forced WL_LATCH_DRIVER fitting
# up to 30. Per Phase 12.7.
D0 GND 0 7000.00
D1 GND 0 7000.00
D2 GND 0 7000.00
D3 GND 0 7000.00
